topic: I wake up tucked into bed so tightly I cannot move and I live alone
title: I Wake Up Tucked Into Bed So Tightly I Cannot Move. I Live Alone. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning I wake tucked into bed so tightly I cannot move my arms. I live completely alone.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person lying in a bed with sheets tucked very tightly across the body, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small apartment, top floor. I am a restless sleeper. Blankets always end on the floor.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small top floor apartment bedroom, a bed with rumpled blankets on the floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never tuck the sheets in.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of loose untucked bed sheets hanging off a mattress, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the sheets were folded tight under the mattress on every side.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of bed sheets folded tightly and tucked under a mattress on all sides, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a person lying flat under tightly tucked sheets, arms pinned, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The corners were creased sharp. Hospital folds I never learned.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a sharply creased hospital fold at the corner of a bed sheet, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I slept on top of the covers.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person lying on top of folded bed covers, dim night light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I woke underneath them. Tucked tight. Again.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person waking under tightly tucked covers again, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the sheets are tighter. Last week I could not sit up for a full minute.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of very taut bed sheets pulled flat across a mattress, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I felt hands smoothing the blanket flat over my chest while I lay still.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smooth flat blanket pressed across a sleeping chest, faint hand shaped impressions, dim night light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw the sheets out and slept in a sleeping bag on the floor.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a sleeping bag laid out on a bare bedroom floor, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the sleeping bag was zipped shut over my head. From the outside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a sleeping bag zipped fully shut over a person's head from the outside, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
